scripts.install:all: cd vue-remote && npm install && cd ../angular-shell && npm install
scripts.info:
echo "
========================================
  Abre → http://localhost:4200/login
  Credenciales: admin@mfe.com / admin123

  Si cambiaste el puerto en webpack.config.js
  usa: http://localhost:<tu-puerto>/login
========================================
"
scripts.start: npm run install:all && npm run prebuild:vue && npm run info && concurrently --kill-others --names vue,angular --prefix-colors green,red "npm run start:vue" "npm run start:angular"
scripts.build: cd vue-remote && npm run build && cd ../angular-shell && npm run build
